full_text:
Soma Dhamareswar Lakshman
lakshmansoma1313@gmail.com | +1 561-884 (6717)
EXPERIENCE
Python Full Stack Intern: KodNest Dream Factory, India Jan 2024 – Apr 2024
• Orchestrated a team of 4 members in a Python full stack project, achieving a 50% reduction in time-to-
market through agile methodologies, optimizing development cycles, ensuring backend integration.
• Led a strategic project pivot, transitioning from a monolithic architecture to microservices, resulting in a
60% improvement in scalability and a 25% decrease in server downtime during peak loads.
Python Full Stack Intern: Codegnan IT Solutions, India May 2023 – Jul 2023
• Spearheaded the development of a Python-based news aggregator project, gathering and organizing articles
from 50 sources, resulting in a 20% increase in user engagement within the first month of deployment.
• Built a robust backend infrastructure using Flask and MongoDB, handling over 10,000 simultaneous user
requests with an average response time of under 100 milliseconds.
Java Developer Intern: BrainOvision Solutions, India Jul 2022 – Oct 2022
• Engineered a responsive user interface component using React.js, enhancing load times by 30% and
reducing server requests by 20% compared to previous implementations.
• Designed and implemented a RESTful API architecture from scratch, resulting in a 25% improvement in
data retrieval efficiency and a 15% decrease in latency over existing solutions.
EDUCATION
Florida Atlantic University, Boca Raton FL 33433 Aug 2024 – Present
Master of Science (M. S.), Artificial Intelligence, CGPA: 3.833/4.0
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada, India Aug 2020 – May 2024
Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech.), Computer Science & Engineering, CGPA: 7.75/10.0
SKILLS
• Programming Languages and Version Control: Python, Flask, Java, Git and GitHub
• Web Development & Others: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, SQL, MySQL, Microsoft Word, Excel, Access
• Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Amazon Web Services, OOPS, Encryption Techniques
PROJECTS
Serverless Healthcare Telemedicine | Python, Flask, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, AWS Apr 2024
• Crafted and executed a Serverless Healthcare Telemedicine platform, resulting in a 40% increase in
consultations and a 50% reduction in overhead within 6 months.
• Conceptualized and assembled a groundbreaking digital healthcare solution, resulting in a remarkable 60%
improvement in patient satisfaction and a significant 30% decrease in scheduling errors.
News Aggregation Web Application using Python | Python, Flask, HTML, CSS, JavaScript Jul 2023
• Pioneered the development of a news aggregator using Python, automating collection from over 50 sources,
reducing manual effort by 70%, and increasing coverage by 50%.
• Developed advanced features like sentiment analysis and collaborative filtering, boosting user engagement
by 60% and increasing retention by 40% within the initial 3 months.
CERTIFICATIONS
• Programming in Java & The Joy of Computing using Python by NPTEL.
• Introduction of Internet of Things from NPTEL.
OTHER QUALIFICATIONS
• Optimized application performance by identifying and resolving critical bottlenecks, reducing load times
by 40% through systematic debugging and performance tuning.
• Leveraged Microsoft Word, Excel, and Access to generate detailed reports and maintain technical
documentation, enhancing team efficiency by 30%.
• Translated complex technical terminologies into clear, concise communication, facilitating seamless
collaboration across cross-functional teams and improving knowledge transfer efficiency by 25%.
